<!--DOCTOR-->
- Resting risk markers are limited from one day only. For 2026-02-22, sleep=6.958h, restingHR=54 bpm, steps=5583.
- Estimated sodium is 3720 mg (salt eq 8.78 g). If blood pressure trends high, reduce salt in the next 24-48h and hydrate.
- If fatigue, edema, or persistent high BP appears, prioritize clinical check over self-adjustment.

<!--TRAINER-->
- Estimated intake is 2469 kcal (Gyudon large x3 assumption). Health total burn=2590 kcal, active=920 kcal.
- Keep NEAT high today: split walking into 2-3 blocks and avoid prolonged sitting.
- Add one resistance session (20-30 min) to stabilize weekly weight trend.

<!--NUTRITIONIST-->
- Macro estimate: P 74.4 g / F 87 g / C 358.5 g. Fiber=43.02 g, Folate=444.42 mcg.
- This meal pattern is carb and sodium heavy. Next meals should emphasize vegetables, lean protein, and potassium-rich foods.
- Keep breakfast protein >=30g and distribute protein across 3 meals.

<!--END-->

## Daily Test Report (2026-02-22)
- Health metrics: real data from /api/summary
- Meal assumption: no meal log found, estimated as Gyudon large x3
- Purpose: backfill test for full nutrient coverage
